operations.value: The clinical evidence base remains limited by small trials, heterogeneous extracts and dosing regimens, variable outcome measures, and risk-of-bias concerns, so results from one preparation should not be generalized to all ashwagandha products.
operations.notes: This is an evidence-quality and product-generalizability limitation rather than a benefit claim.

sources.title: Does Ashwagandha supplementation have a beneficial effect on the management of anxiety and stress? A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials
Safety and efficacy of Withania somnifera for anxiety and insomnia: Systematic review and meta-analysis

notes: Adds a cross-cutting interpretation limitation to prevent overgeneralization across extracts and products.
